title: Ubiquiti LiteAP 5AC-16-120, LAP-120, 120°
category: Ubiquiti / Wireless / Outdoor units / AirMAX AC
description: LiteBeam LBE-5AC-16-120 is a outdoor basestation with Gigabit LAN port and built-in 16dBi sector antenna with 120° beam angle. The unit is compatible only with other airMAX AC products. airMAX® ac products offer improved latency, noise immunity, scalability and significantly increased throughput performance. New for all airMAX AC products is a new operating system AirOS 7 . This system shows constellation diagram and SNR in real time. Package contains Device Holder PoE power adapter Power… Device Holder PoE power adapter Power cord Metal ring
